items.name_cn:
'Burberry'
Small crossbody bag 'Title-Tyler Bag', made of leather and canvas with decorative topstitching. Features the Fashion Show Horseferry print, a refined top metal bar design, and three rivet closures.
Size: W19×H15×D5cm
Model: 2731, Small
Shortest vertical strap length: 47cm
Longest vertical strap length: 53cm
Adjustable crossbody strap
2 interior compartments
Top flap with magnetic snap closure
Hand-painted edges
Glossy metal hardware
Made in Italy

items.name_cn:
『Burberry』
Burberry vintage series new small messenger bag! Imported vintage brown cowhide, 1.4cm thick. Imported Limonta vintage series new arrival! Top-grain cowhide paired with classic check, vintage brown adds an artistic touch! Check pattern is eco-friendly, easy to clean, and good for daily use. Size: 21x8.5x18cm!
